## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Plaid and GrowthX for content strategy and creation services.](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint ($30,000) followed by ongoing content creation and optimization services (starting at $15,000/month)](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [GrowthX uses an audience-first approach, creating detailed artifacts and content strategies tailored to specific personas and topics](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [The service includes end-to-end content creation, publishing, and optimization, with potential to work alongside existing SEO/AEO teams](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Strategy Approach

  - [Focuses on audience-first methodology, creating detailed personas and topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Uses AI-assisted workflows for research, content creation, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Emphasizes creating trust with the audience while optimizing for search and LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Generates various content types: blog posts, guides, directories, calculators, and more](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### GrowthX's Service Offering

  - [8-week strategy sprint: $30,000, includes deep research and strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Ongoing services start at $15,000/month for daily publishing and content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [Additional work streams (e.g., newsletter creation) range from $9,000 to $15,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Typical client engagements range from $15,000 to $60,000 per month](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)

### Plaid's Potential Engagement

  - [Discussed focusing on a specific area (e.g., fraud solutions) or audience (e.g., chief risk officers)](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Potential to work alongside Plaid's existing SEO/AEO team](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [GrowthX can act as an execution arm for Plaid's internal teams' ideas](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)

### Content Publishing and Security

  - [GrowthX can publish directly on clients' websites with varying levels of security](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Employs vetted and trained publishers for sensitive information handling](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [Adaptable to different CMS systems and security requirements](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send sample SOW and language for the 8-week strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Plaid to consider inviting GrowthX to a shared Slack for easier communication](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [GrowthX to send availability dates for potential kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [Plaid to review proposal and determine if budget aligns with expectations](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting with additional Plaid team members if needed](https://fathom.video/share/S_Jkazsr-EjVQ2P82NH_zK-1gxheUAEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
